pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the juke.lute repository, explaining its purpose as a collection of ABC music files for LOTRO solo lute play, and providing a high-level overview of the archive collections and tooling ecosystem

pages.title: Music Archive Collections
pages.purpose: Document the instrument-specific ZIP archives that contain ABC music files, emphasizing the critical juke.lute.zip archive and explaining the archive format and deployment lifecycle

pages.title: Lute Collection (Primary Archive)
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of juke.lute.zip, the most critical archive (importance: 91.17), including its internal architecture, deployment pipeline, data flow, and integration patterns

pages.title: Additional Instrument Archives
pages.purpose: Document the secondary instrument archives (fiddle, duet, flute, violin, bassoon), their structure, and how they complement the primary lute collection

pages.title: Content Organization Philosophy
pages.purpose: Explain the 'play by ear' organization system, folder structure (folk, formal, long6, etc.), file naming conventions, and the anti-hierarchical design philosophy

pages.title: Jukebox Playback System
pages.purpose: Document the jukebox.ps1 random player system for continuous ABC file playback, including architecture, player selection, and usage patterns

pages.title: Jukebox Player Configuration
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of jukebox.ps1 configuration parameters, folder selection, history tracking, and the main execution loop

pages.title: External Player Integration
pages.purpose: Document integration with AbcPlayer.exe and Maestro.exe, including player selection, file launching, and playback control mechanisms

pages.title: ABC File Management Workflow
pages.purpose: Comprehensive guide to creating, converting, editing, and managing ABC music files, from source acquisition through MIDI conversion to final ABC format

pages.title: Archive Creation with zip_loop.ps1
pages.purpose: Document the automated ZIP archive creation process, including folder scanning, compression, purging old archives, and the deployment workflow

pages.title: ABC File Acquisition and Conversion
pages.purpose: Explain the complete pipeline from live recordings and audio files through MIDI conversion using Maestro, WaoN, and FFmpeg to final ABC format

pages.title: Playlist Creation and Merging
pages.purpose: Document the process of creating ABC playlists by merging multiple melody files, including M:Q:K: field matching requirements and invisible rest notation

pages.title: Editing Tools and Resources
pages.purpose: Reference guide for desktop applications (Notepad++, VSCodium, EasyABC), scripting environments (PowerShell, Python, Bash), and external ABC/MIDI libraries

pages.title: Local Distribution and Web Sharing
pages.purpose: Document the HTTP server system for sharing ABC files over local networks using web_get.py and web_env.py configuration

pages.title: HTTP File Server (web_get.py)
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the Python HTTP server script, including IP discovery, file scanning, URL generation, and Python 2/3 compatibility

pages.title: Server Configuration (web_env.py)
pages.purpose: Document the web server configuration file, including LOCAL_HOST, LOCAL_PORT, TARGET_EXTENSIONS, and SERVE_FILES settings

pages.title: LOTRO Game Integration
pages.purpose: Explain how ABC archives integrate with Lord of the Rings Online, including the mandatory Songbook MOD requirement and deployment to the LOTRO Music folder

pages.title: Deployment to LOTRO Music Folder
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for extracting archives, organizing files in the LOTRO Music directory, running songbook.hta, and the manual update workflow

pages.title: Songbook MOD Requirements
pages.purpose: Explain why the Songbook MOD (Chiran or Badger) is mandatory due to long filenames, document MOD selection criteria, and explain the index rebuild process

pages.title: Script Reference
pages.purpose: Consolidated reference documentation for all PowerShell and Python scripts in the my.tools/ directory

pages.title: Script Usage Guide
pages.purpose: Quick reference for executing jukebox.ps1, zip_loop.ps1, and web_get.py, including command-line arguments, prerequisites, and common workflows

pages.title: Development Environment Setup
pages.purpose: Guide to setting up the development environment, including PowerShell execution policies, Python version requirements, required applications, and workspace configuration

pages.title: Future Development and AI Integration
pages.purpose: Document the aspirational goals for AI-driven ABC music generation, including planned LLM training using the jukebox corpus and references to existing AI music projects
